title: Enticing, Sugary, Boundless or Songs and Dances About Death
original_title: Манливий, солодкий, без меж, або Пісні і танці про смерть
overview: In a delicate and humane manner, this film touches upon a very serious issue: how to stop fearing death while being in love with life. We talk (and laugh) about this subject with the protagonists of this film, modern geniuses and ordinary people from different parts of the world.
